LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_Breach: The dominion slice has formed. Secure the threshold and push toward the anchor lattice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_Anchorfall: The anchor lattice is live. Destroy the remaining anchors: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_HeartExposed: The Crown-Heart is exposed. Break it before the slice reorganizes.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_CollapseStart: The Crown-Heart has ruptured. Extraction window remaining: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_Failed: The dominion slice is collapsing in failure.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_Wave: Dominion support wave engaged: {0} hostiles. Wave #{1}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceHeart_Shielded: The Crown-Heart is still shielded by dominion anchors.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceHeart_InspectShielded: The heart remains shielded. Destroy the dominion anchors first.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceHeart_InspectExposed: The heart is exposed. Collapse in: {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_SealEffect: Pulse effect: reinforces the Crown-Heart barrier and extends shield pressure.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_ChoirEffect: Pulse effect: accelerates incoming support waves and attracts escort cells.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_LawEffect: Pulse effect: intensifies ambient punishment and biases the slice toward sniper and warden pressure.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceEncounter_HeartDestroye:
The Dominion Heart has been destroyed.
The anchors fail. The crown-lines collapse. The pocket realm is losing coherence.
This was not simply a battle won. Your colonists have broken a local law of the Abyss — a claim of rule made physical.
The reward pocket has opened, but the slice is collapsing. Take what remains and reach extraction before something deeper answers.
